executives.name: Brian West
executives.background: Mr. West has served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since August 2021. Prior to joining Boeing, he was CFO of Refinitiv and Oscar Health.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Executive Vice President of Operations

executives.name: Vanessa Wittman
executives.background: Vanessa Wittman has served as a member of our board of directors since May 2021. Ms. Wittman served as the Chief Financial Officer of Glossier, Inc. from April 2019 to May 2022.
